title: Cute Cat Cookie Cutter 3D Printed PLA | 7-8cm Medium Size | Kawaii Kitten Baking Tool | Cat Lover Gift
description:
Cute Cat Cookie Cutter – Adorable Kitten Shape for Purrfect Baking Fun

Bring a touch of feline charm to your kitchen with this adorable cute cat cookie cutter! Designed with love and precision, this 3D-printed cookie cutter features an irresistibly cute cat silhouette that will make every batch of cookies a delightful experience. Whether you are a passionate baker, a devoted cat lover, or someone who simply enjoys adding a playful twist to homemade treats, this cookie cutter is the perfect addition to your baking collection.

Features & Details

This cute cat cookie cutter is carefully designed to capture every charming detail of an adorable sitting kitten, complete with perky ears and a sweet tail. The cutter produces clean, sharp edges that hold their shape beautifully during baking. Made using high-quality 3D printing technology, each cutter is crafted with attention to detail and consistency. The sturdy yet lightweight construction makes it comfortable to press through cookie dough, fondant, clay, and other craft materials. The design is deep enough to create a well-defined impression every single time you use it.

Dimensions

This listing is for the Medium (M) size, which measures approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its widest point. This is an ideal size for standard cookies, decorated sugar cookies, and fondant toppers. It is also a versatile size that works beautifully for party platters and gift boxes without being too large or too small.

How to Use

Using your cute cat cookie cutter is simple and fun. Roll out your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 4-6mm for best results. Press the cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then gently lift and remove excess dough from around the shape. If the dough sticks, lightly dust the cutter with flour or cornstarch before pressing. For fondant and modeling clay, apply a thin layer of cornstarch to prevent sticking. Once cut, carefully transfer your shapes to a baking sheet using a spatula. Bake according to your favorite recipe and enjoy perfectly shaped cat cookies every time.

Care Instructions

Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water and gently remove any residual dough with a soft brush or toothpick. Allow the cutter to air dry completely before storing. Avoid exposure to high heat, as PLA material can warp at elevated temperatures. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to ensure your cookie cutter lasts for many baking sessions to come.

Perfect Gift Ideas

This cute cat cookie cutter makes a wonderful gift for so many occasions. It is an ideal stocking stuffer for the holidays or a thoughtful addition to a birthday gift basket for any cat enthusiast. Pair it with a favorite cookie recipe and some sprinkles for a charming DIY baking gift set that anyone would love. It is also a fantastic party favor for cat-themed birthday parties, bridal showers, or bachelorette events. Teachers, coworkers, and friends who love to bake will absolutely adore receiving this unique and practical little gift.

About Our Shop

Welcome to our shop, where every item is lovingly handmade and crafted with care. We specialize in small-batch 3D-printed baking tools and accessories, ensuring each piece meets our high standards of quality. Every cookie cutter is printed to order, which means you receive a freshly made product designed just for you. We take pride in combining creativity with functionality to bring you unique baking tools that make your kitchen adventures more enjoyable.
